U.D. CASE P/T JUDGE SCOTT MILLER, RPTR. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. IN PRO PER ATTY. FOR DEFT. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. ALL PRESENT. STIPULATED JUDGEMENT FOR PLTF: PLTF. TO HAVE POSSESSION OF PREMISES. PLTF. TO HAVE MONEY JUDGMNT. FOR $2,558.75. EACH SIDE WAIVE COSTS. STAY TIL 1/31/95. THE DEFT. IS TO PAY $600.00 A MONTH RENT ON 11/8/94, 12/8/94, AND 1/8/95. IF DEFT. FAILS TO MAKE MONTHLY RENT ON THOSE DATES, THE PLTF. MAY MOVE THE COURT BY EXPARTE MOTION FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF PREMISES. ALL POSSESSIONS LEFT BEHIND ARE DEEMED ABANDONED.
